segments.scene_description: A static view of a atmospheric gothic classroom interior with students seated at wooden desks. Tall arched windows at the far end filter dim light through the hazy air, while stone pillars flank the room. The scene remains completely still with no camera movement or action, maintaining a quiet, studious atmosphere throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a dimly lit gothic classroom that preserves a sense of quiet stillness. It begins with a wide view of students seated at wooden desks, framed by heavy stone pillars. The gaze remains fixed as dim light filters through tall arched windows at the far end of the room, illuminating the hazy air. The scene persists in this frozen state, holding a studious and somber mood without any shift in camera position or action.
